news.title:
Nifty Consumer Durables index surged 4.48% as RBI maintained repo rate at 5.25%. Gains led by Kajaria Ceramics, PG Electroplast.
Amber Enterprises, Blue Star, Dixon, Kalyan Jewellers, and Bata India also rose over 4%. Stable rates boost consumer demand optimism.
news.summary:
Nifty Consumer Durables index surged 4.48% as RBI maintained repo rate at 5.25%. Gains led by Kajaria Ceramics, PG Electroplast.
Amber Enterprises, Blue Star, Dixon, Kalyan Jewellers, and Bata India also rose over 4%. Stable rates boost consumer demand optimism.

news.title:
PG Electroplast's subsidiary received approval for Rs. 37.5 Cr incentive under PLI scheme.
The incentive relates to FY24-25 sales value for white goods like ACs and LED lights.
news.summary:
PG Electroplast's subsidiary received approval for Rs. 37.5 Cr incentive under PLI scheme.
The incentive relates to FY24-25 sales value for white goods like ACs and LED lights.

news.title:
PG Electroplast shares surged 9% as LPG production challenges were largely resolved.
Room ACs, contributing 73% to topline, saw near-normalized production; stock trades 7.3% higher at ₹536.7.
news.summary:
PG Electroplast shares surged 9% as LPG production challenges were largely resolved.
Room ACs, contributing 73% to topline, saw near-normalized production; stock trades 7.3% higher at ₹536.7.

news.title: PG Electroplast (PGEL) updates on LPG gas supply constraints impacting operations.
news.summary: PG Electroplast (PGEL) updates on LPG gas supply constraints impacting operations.

news.title:
PG Electroplast faces LPG supply shortages due to geopolitical tensions.
The company plans alternative energy sources to sustain Room AC production.
news.summary:
PG Electroplast faces LPG supply shortages due to geopolitical tensions.
The company plans alternative energy sources to sustain Room AC production.

news.title:
PG Electroplast's board approved postal ballot notice for reappointing independent directors.
Key managerial personnel details updated for disclosure purposes; meeting lasted 1hr 15 mins.
news.summary:
PG Electroplast's board approved postal ballot notice for reappointing independent directors.
Key managerial personnel details updated for disclosure purposes; meeting lasted 1hr 15 mins.

news.title:
Nuvama cuts PG Electroplast's target price to Rs 780 from Rs 800 due to Q4 disruptions.
FY26/FY27 earnings lowered 14%/1% for weak Q4; demand healthy, capex/new products on track.
news.summary:
Nuvama cuts PG Electroplast's target price to Rs 780 from Rs 800 due to Q4 disruptions.
FY26/FY27 earnings lowered 14%/1% for weak Q4; demand healthy, capex/new products on track.

news.title: Graviton Research Capital LLP bought 1,437,520 shares of PG Electroplast at ₹505.3.
news.summary: Graviton Research Capital LLP bought 1,437,520 shares of PG Electroplast at ₹505.3.

news.title:
PG Electroplast faces production crisis; LPG shortage halts 2 of 4 plants.
CNBC TV18 reports disruption caused by LPG lack affecting operations.
news.summary:

news.title: PG Electroplast expects adjustments to revenue guidance, impacting financial forecasts.

news.title:
PG Electroplast shares drop 7% due to LPG allocation cut amid US-Iran war.
Gas supply issues impact production; shares trade 6.6% lower at ₹568.9.
news.summary:
PG Electroplast shares drop 7% due to LPG allocation cut amid US-Iran war.
Gas supply issues impact production; shares trade 6.6% lower at ₹568.9.

news.title:
PG Electroplast faces gas shortage as suppliers report issues.
Agreement with suppliers effective March 9, 2026, impacted.
news.summary:
PG Electroplast faces gas shortage as suppliers report issues.
Agreement with suppliers effective March 9, 2026, impacted.

news.title:
Crisil reaffirmed PG Electroplast's long-term rating at Crisil A (Stable) and short-term rating at Crisil A1.
Subsidiaries PG Technoplast and Next Generation Manufacturers' ratings were also reaffirmed with increased loan facilities.
news.summary:
Crisil reaffirmed PG Electroplast's long-term rating at Crisil A (Stable) and short-term rating at Crisil A1.
Subsidiaries PG Technoplast and Next Generation Manufacturers' ratings were also reaffirmed with increased loan facilities.

news.title:
PG Electroplast Ltd to join Dolat Capital Corporate Conference 2026 on Feb 18.
Meeting will be physical at Grand Hyatt, Mumbai; no UPSI to be discussed.
news.summary:
PG Electroplast Ltd to join Dolat Capital Corporate Conference 2026 on Feb 18.

news.title:
PG Electroplast is optimistic about meeting full-year sales goals.
The company faces uncertainties in the air conditioning market.
news.summary:

news.title:
PG Electroplast plans INR 700-750 cr capex for Greater Noida, Supa, Rajasthan, and Sri City.
Historically, Q4 delivers highest performance, contributing majorly to annual PAT.
news.summary:

The audio recording is available on PGEL's website for reference.

news.title:
PG Electroplast's Q3 net profit rises to 620M INR from 395M YOY.
Q3 revenue increases to 14B INR from 9.68B YOY.

The physical group meeting will be at The Fullerton Hotel, Singapore, with no UPSI discussed.

news.title:
PG Electroplast acquires 72-acre land in Kamargaon, Ahilyanagar for ₹1000 crore.
The project indicates major growth prospects in Maharashtra for the company.
